title: Excalibur | Luminous Support
description: A bridge between LUMINOUS: BEASTS and Excalibur.
body:
A resource pack for Luminous: beasts

W.I.P

- Best Used with Excalibur
 
- And Requires LUMINOUS: BEASTS 

Current mobs include:
- Tree Ent (Oak)
- Piglin Executioner (Basalt and Normal)
- Phoenix (normal, baby, wind , wind baby)
- Vipers (rare and normal)
- Gators (forzen and normal)

Current items:
Root
viper fang
croc tooth
